title: cyanea truncata
intro: Cyanea truncata, also known as the Hawaiian lobelia, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and even exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Cyanea truncata is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
